@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.sjpzocxNFbZecfcY]{Wall Of Duplicates}

Playing and Roleplaying as an Item

If you’re using the rules above to play as an item rather than a character with your own ancestry, background, class, and full agency to act as you please, you have a stricter limit to the number of ways you can interact with the world around you. As an item weapon, you can’t necessarily go where you want, as you depend on your wielder to take you where you need to go and can only activate your item abilities, use feats from this book, and take a limited set of other actions, typically involving thinking, remembering, and conversing with other characters rather than other major combat actions or exploration activities.

Typically, if you’ve chosen the option to play as an item instead of as a character using the normal ancestry rules, the limited agency is exactly what you wanted and expected, and you intend to tag team and coordinate your character with another player you trust, acting as their character’s weapon and fellow partner for adventure. Even so, it’s important to take these limitations into consideration and have an open discussion with the player you intend to play as your wielder to make sure you have a shared understanding of your roles and expectations.

For example, it wouldn’t be fun if the wielder player constantly moved around during combat and took actions that prevented you from using any of your weapon abilities. On the other hand, being the partner with less in-game agency doesn’t give you license to decide all the wielder’s turns to best make use of your limited weapon actions. Instead, you’ll want to strike a balance by discussing ahead of time, either during Session 0 or in a private conversation, to make sure you’re both on the same page. There are few things more fun in a tabletop RPG than a successfully coordinated pair of characters with great synergy, and having a conversation to set your expectations allows you to avoid the various pitfalls and make the most of your experience. You’ll want to communicate with the other players who aren’t playing your wielder as well, but this shouldn’t require a complicated discussion. You can explain to them your limitations as an intelligent weapon, as well as the benefits of your weapon form, letting them know that there might be certain actions and roles they can’t count on you to perform or fulfill. That way, they can focus on making sure you have those niches covered. For example, if your item abilities don’t include any healing spells, you’re likely unable to provide the party with any healing, which means if you’re the last one standing, the rest of the team will be left there bleeding. It thus becomes important for the party to have a way to heal each other, and they might want to take extra care to keep your wielder conscious since you won’t be able to move around the battlefield without them, meaning that the team loses more of their effectiveness than normal if your wielder is knocked unconscious and taken out of the fight.

Once you have the logistics out of the way, you and your group can have fun leaning into the various tropes and implications around intelligent weapons. Think about how your lack of agency as an item colors your view of the world around you. In what ways can you still interact with the world, and in what ways can you never interact? Do these differences mean that you’re more likely to pay attention to certain features or aspects of the world than others? Perhaps due to always being carried from place to place, your concept of space and distance are different from those of a creature, or maybe the concept of a daily routine seems alien to you without the lynchpins of meals and rests that punctuate a creature’s circadian rhythm. Intelligent weapon characters have a life force and would surely understand these things, but as an item, you might or might not. Choose whatever option is most interesting for the story and for roleplaying your character.

Another thing to consider as an item is the history of your previous wielders, if any. Are you a brand new intelligent weapon or one with a millennia-long track record replete with heroics? Even if you decide on a lengthy history, you don’t have to work out that entire history in advance. Instead, you could play the seemingly endless amount of experience as an inexhaustible well of spontaneous anecdotes, comparing any given adventure to a new part of your weapon’s backstory you just invented on the fly. "This maze of misery reminds me of a few centuries back when my partner and I were tricked into entering a house that a villain had filled with devious traps and riddles. They wound up falling into their own trap in the end!"

You can also use the relic aspects and gifts that you and the GM choose together to help determine facets of your character’s history and personality. For example, as an intelligent weapon with gifts from the fiend aspect, you might have a fiendish appearance or demeanor (even if you’re not malevolent once they get to know you), or you might have been smithed in the forges of Hell or wielded by an ancient graveknight in service to the forces of Abaddon. While your relic aspects might tell the stories of your past, the monster parts you gain during play that level up your capabilities reflect the you of the present, showing how you continue to evolve.

Just a Weapon, Not an Ancestry.name: 只是一把武器，而不是族裔 Just a Weapon, Not an Ancestry
Just a Weapon, Not an Ancestry.text:
要使用这条变体规则，请将 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.0NiIJFfr8hAuJ0wS]{Intelligent Weapon (Alternate)} 职业添加到你的角色卡上，而不是添加族裔、传承、背景或一个标准职业。设置完成后，你将被提示选择你的能力值。使用该职业物品时不需要能力提升管理器。

本书中的族裔机制是为那些想要游玩一个完整角色（族裔、背景与职业），并对其角色做什么、去哪里拥有完全自主权的玩家而构建的。但有时候，你想要的“智能武器”只是由另一位玩家的角色携带的一把武器，而你无法自行移动。这仍然是一个可行的角色，而智能武器在世界中是独立的个体。在那种情况下，试图添加族裔、背景与职业就像把方钉硬塞进圆孔：默认情况下，你将无法执行大多数职业所依赖的动作；而为了允许你仍能执行它们而做例外，会创造出一个拥有大量防御收益的角色——而该游戏系统的设计本就不是为了让道具破坏成为常见现象。你和你的团体在少见的情况下仍可选择后者方案，例如用于一个非常年幼的孩子的角色（让他们无需处理移动或大多数危险），但对大多数团体而言，另一种解决方案更好。

如果你想扮演一把智能武器，而且它仅仅是一把武器，不具备本书中任何传承所带来的额外自主性，那么请使用常规的智能物品规则，并做少量调整。这意味着：你在每个回合可以获得动作，用以启动你自己（不包括那些对物品而言由自己启动毫无意义的启动方式，例如由持用者进行一次打击的启动），并执行纯粹的心智动作，如“回忆知识”，或社交动作如“交涉”。

首先，你的智能武器应当有一种沟通方式，并且你可以将 18、16 与 14 分配给你的三个心智能力值（如同智能物品的常规规则，你没有身体能力值）。其次，你始终拥有精确视觉、模糊听觉与言语能力，并且你在察觉上为专家（这意味着你的察觉调整值为 4 + 你的物品等级 + 你的感知调整值）；若你达到物品等级 11，则改为察觉大师。第三，选择数量等同于 4 + 你的智力调整值的技能；这些技能必须是基于智力、感知或魅力的技能，并在这些技能上成为受训（这意味着你的调整值为 2 + 你的物品等级 + 你的相应调整值）。在 3 级以及此后每个奇数物品等级时，你获得一次技能提升，其运作方式与其他角色的技能提升相同。

第四，你在意志豁免上为专家（这意味着你的调整值为 4 + 你的物品等级 + 你的感知调整值）。若你达到物品等级 13，则改为意志豁免大师。与其他智能物品一样，你没有强韧或反射豁免调整值，并且你通常会改用持用者的调整值，或按情况自动失败，这取决于效果。第五，尽管你没有族裔，你仍会在 1、5、9、13 与 17 物品等级时，从智能武器族裔获得一个族裔专长。你只能选择那些对你作为物品而非角色生效的专长；通常而言，能赋予你新启动方式的专长更好，因为那会拓宽你的选项。为确定这些专长的 DC 之目的，请使用与你等级相符的物品 DC，而不是职业DC或法术DC；若你需要进行法术攻击掷骰，则使用该物品 DC – 10。

最后，你会随着时间推移而提升力量，提高你的物品等级。如果你拥有《Battlezoo Bestiary》，你可以使用精炼武器的进度表，并依据获得 XP 与升级来获得相应收益，而不是依据花费怪物部件来精炼。你仍需要花费怪物部件来为自己灌注灌注属性；并且如果你尚未通过你的 1 级族裔专长这样做，那么强烈建议先灌注一个魔法路径属性，这样你就能获得一个戏法启动，并在每次有机会时使用它。如果你没有 Battlezoo 的怪物部件系统，你可以用如下方式近似：每当你获得足够 XP 时就提升你的物品等级，同时提高你的物品 DC；并在你达到其等级时免费添加基础符文。符文并不总能提供那么多有用的启动方式，因此你需要发挥创意；作为替代方案，你可以不添加属性符文，而是选择通过支付该武器与那些你免费获得的基础符文之间的差价，来成为某一把特定武器。无论你选择哪条路径，你也会作为遗珍推进，与 GM 协作选择与智能武器主题相符且运作良好的合适赋礼。例如，邪魔的“指挥军团”赋礼对智能武器很棒，因为它为你提供了一个很好的方式来花费你的动作；而天界的“神圣报应”赋礼就不太好，除非你已经有大量可用的启动方式，因为它涉及由你的持用者进行一次打击，因此他们必须在该启动上花费自己的动作。

通过这些修改，你应当会拥有一把具备许多有趣能力的智能武器，它作为智能物品而非普通角色来运作——非常适合让你的战士朋友挥舞你投入战斗。几乎难以触及所带来的防御收益，大致会与缺乏职业特性与职业专长相互抵消；不过，即使没有职业，你通常仍能组合出相当一套可用能力。在多数情况下，GM 在决定遭遇时应将你视为队伍中的额外角色，但其中部分取决于你选择的选项；如果你相对缺乏常驻启动，并且在一次遭遇中花了许多轮来打趣与回忆知识，而非施展物品的特殊能力，那么不将你计入、或按一半或其他分数计入，可能更合适。在非常小的团体中（例如，只有另一名玩家），这一点尤为如此：你的武器角色不会吸引敌人的攻击，并且当持用者昏迷或死亡时也无法充分贡献，这意味着“死亡螺旋”会比平常更接近发生。如果除了你的仅物品型智能武器之外发生了全队团灭或全队倒地，也许那就是促使你成为完整角色的契机：获得一个完整职业，然后使用本书中的某个传承，亲自踏上冒险之路，为同伴复仇、拯救他们的生命，或继承他们的意志。

To use this variant rule add the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.0NiIJFfr8hAuJ0wS]{Intelligent Weapon (Alternate)} class to your actor, instead of adding the ancestry, heritage, background, or a standard class. Once set you will be prompted to select your ability scores. The ability boost manager is not needed when using this class item.

The ancestry mechanics in this book are built for players who want to play a full character (ancestry, background, and class) with total agency in what their character does and where they go. But sometimes, what you’re looking for in an intelligent weapon is just a weapon carried by another player’s character who is unable to move on your own. That’s still a viable character, and intelligent weapons are their own individual in the world. In that case, trying to add an ancestry, background, and class is like fitting a square peg in a round hole: by default, you would be unable to perform most actions classes depend on, and an exception to allow you to perform them anyway would create a character with the many defensive benefits of a game system designed not to have gear destruction as a common occurrence. You and your group could still choose to use that latter option in unusual cases, such as for the character of a very young child (allowing them to avoid dealing with movement or most dangers), but for most groups, another solution is best.

If you’d like to play an intelligent weapon that is just a weapon without the added agency of any of the heritages in this book, use the normal intelligent item rules with a few adjustments. This means that you can gain actions each turn that you can use to Activate yourself (other than activations that make no sense for the item to Activate on their own, such as activations where the wielder makes a Strike) and to perform purely mental actions like Recall Knowledge or social actions like Diplomacy.

First, your intelligent weapon should have a way to communicate, and you can assign 18, 16, and 14 to your three mental ability scores (you have no physical ability scores, as normal for an intelligent item). Second, you always have precise vision, imprecise hearing, and speech, and you’re an expert in Perception (meaning your Perception modifier is 4 plus your item level plus your Wisdom modifier); if you reach an item level of 11, you become a master in Perception instead. Third, choose a number of skills equal to 4 plus your Intelligence modifier, which must be Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma-based skills, and become trained in those skills (meaning your modifier is 2 plus your item level plus your appropriate modifier). At 3rd level and every odd item level thereafter, you gain a skill increase, which functions like skill increases for other characters.

Fourth, you are an expert in Will saves (meaning your modifier is 4 plus your item level plus your Wisdom modifier). If you reach an item level of 13, you become a master in Will saves. Like other intelligent items, you don’t have a Fortitude or Reflex save modifier, and you’ll usually use the modifier of your wielder or automatically fail, as relevant, depending on the effect. Fifth, even though you don’t have an ancestry, you gain an ancestry feat from the intelligent weapon ancestry at 1st, 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th item levels. You can only choose feats that have an effect for you as an item, not a character; typically, feats that grant you new activations are better since that broadens your options. Use an item DC for an item of your level instead of a class DC or spell DC for the purpose of determining the DCs for these feats, and if you need to make a spell attack roll, use that item DC – 10.

Lastly, you scale in power over time, increasing your item level. If you have Battlezoo Bestiary, you can use the progression table for refining a weapon and gain the benefits based on earning XP and leveling up, rather than based on spending monster parts to refine. You still need to spend monster parts to imbue yourself with imbued properties, and if you didn’t already do so from your 1st level ancestry feat, it’s highly recommended to imbue a magic path property first so you can gain a cantrip activation and use it at every opportunity. If you don’t have the Battlezoo monster parts system, you can approximate it by leveling up your item level whenever you earn enough XP, raising your item DC as you do, and adding fundamental runes for free whenever you reach their level. Runes don’t always allow for as many useful activations, so you’ll need to be creative; as an alternative, instead of adding property runes, you can choose to become a specific weapon by paying the difference between the weapon and the fundamental runes you gained for free. Whichever of those paths you choose, you also advance as a relic, working with your GM to choose appropriate gifts for your intelligent weapon’s theme that work well. For instance, fiend’s command legion gift is great for an intelligent weapon because it gives you a good way to spend your actions, while celestial’s divine retribution gift isn’t great unless you have plenty of activations to use already because it involves your wielder making a Strike, so they’ll have to use their own actions on the activation.

With these modifications, you should have an intelligent weapon with many interesting abilities that functions as an intelligent item, not a normal character, perfect for letting your fighter friend wield you into battle. The defensive benefits of being virtually untouchable roughly cancel out the lack of class features and class feats, though you’ll still often be able to put together quite a line-up of abilities to use, even without a class. In most cases, the GM should consider you to be an additional character in the party for the purpose of determining encounters, but some of that depends on the options you chose; if you have relatively few evergreen activations and spend a lot of rounds in an encounter quipping and Recalling Knowledge instead of slinging item special abilities, it might be more appropriate not to count you, or to count you for half or another fractional amount. In a very small group (for instance, with one other player), this is especially true: your weapon character isn’t drawing any of the enemy’s attacks and isn’t capable of fully contributing if your wielder is unconscious or dead, meaning that a death spiral is closer than normal. If there’s a total party kill or knockout aside from your item-only intelligent weapon, maybe that’s the impetus to become a full character, gaining a full class, and then using one of the heritages from this book to adventure on your own to avenge your comrades, save their lives, or carry on their will.

Demonic Marauder Archetype.name: 恶魔劫掠者变体 Demonic Marauder Archetype
Demonic Marauder Archetype.text:
对许多叛逃的恶魔而言，从自身罪孽的锁链中获得自由，使他们得以发展出在深渊时从未想象过的全新而奇异的战斗技巧。然而，也有一些叛逃者对冥渊怀有怀旧之情，试图将自己曾经轻易驾驭的力量引入作为叛逃者的新生活。其他叛逃者不赞同这一选择，便创造了“恶魔掠夺者”一词来形容这些将深渊技法融入战斗风格的恶魔，起初意在暗示掠夺者缺乏细腻或技巧。然而，绝大多数恶魔掠夺者发现这个称呼听起来酷极了，便欣然接受。那些对该词感到不适或不喜欢其由来者，有时会使用诸如“恶魔宗师”之类的替代称呼，他们认为这更能体现自己的技能水平。

事实上，恶魔掠夺者拥有相当高超的技能，他们运用武技时所展现的艺术性与喜悦，是大多数其他生物难以理解的。恶魔掠夺者有时会解释：把这些原本强加于其灵魂之上、迫使他们以特定方式行事的能力，转而重新占为己有，使之成为掠夺者真正能够掌控的事物，这种过程既解放、刺激又令人满足。这使掠夺者得以与过去、现在与未来的自己和解，帮助他们理解自身身份并掌控自己的生活。

话虽如此，高超的技术并不必然意味着极其严苛的标准或禁欲的生活方式。尽管恶魔掠夺者会进行严格训练以保持身心处于巅峰状态，但大多数人完全按自己的条件、以自己的步调来做，更依赖本能而非例行流程。尽管如此，监管者以建立纪律严明的武术学派来练习并教授恶魔掠夺者技法而闻名，但他们只是少数例外，反倒更凸显了多数其他恶魔掠夺者的倾向。

不论你是如何做到的，作为一名恶魔掠夺者，你已经解锁了你体内残存的、曾经的恶魔之力所蕴藏的全部武斗潜能——或者在你成为叛逃者之后，飘离于来世而遗失的那部分力量——而你不会停下，直到你取得你所能达到的一切力量。无论你用那力量帮助他人、守护你在意之物，或满足自身冲动，力量本身才是最重要的。正是它让你能在这个巨人与巨龙的世界里坐上同一张桌子，确保你的意见与信念被听见。为此，你在道德上有义务去达到你能达到的最高力量等级，以便按你选择的方式使用它。

定义你的风格

当你成为恶魔掠夺者时，你决定将深渊对你的压迫与诅咒所用的工具重新占为己有，把它们转化为你生命中积极且赋能的力量。这也意味着，你要定义一种只属于你、并且与所有其他恶魔掠夺者都不同的风格。尽管恶魔掠夺者变体中的专长会在选择该变体的人之间共享——就像它们所映射的深渊能力一样——但你选择如何表达这些专长与能力，则独一无二。

例如，一名恶魔掠夺者的横冲直撞也许是不计后果、血腥地践踏并撞碎一切，朋友与敌人一并遭殃；而另一名则可能优雅而致命，以艺术般的气质穿行于敌人之间，移动毫不浪费。采用第二种风格的掠夺者也许会把自己的“横冲直撞”称为“千刃之舞”。同样地，尽管名为“亵渎赋礼”，一名魅魔掠夺者可能会认为自己的赋礼象征着一种她以往从未体会过的亲密与情谊。毕竟，她的盟友知道她是谁、能做什么，所以仍然信任她。她可能改称该能力为“共享信任之礼”，并强调同伴信心所蕴含的形而上力量——他们相信魅魔不会滥用这一能力。

如果你不确定该从哪里开始定义你作为恶魔掠夺者的个人风格，不妨从你的角色主题或视觉形象着手，选择你更容易想象的那个。在思考主题时，你为角色选择的恶魔宿主会是一个很好的起点；在视觉方面，试着想象你角色的攻击与战斗风格。一旦主题或视觉形象成形，看看你能否概括它对你角色战斗风格的意义。如果这意味着你想从角色视角为变体中的一些专长改名，那不仅完全没问题，而且很可能也说明你对自己角色的战斗风格有着强烈的把握！

专长

2级

For many renegade demons, freedom from the chains of their sin allows them to develop new and unusual combat techniques unlike anything they ever imagined back in the Abyss. However, there are other renegades who feel a sense of nostalgia for the chthonic and seek to channel the power they once wielded with ease into their new life as a renegade. Disapproving of this decision, other renegades coined the term "demonic marauder" to characterize these demons who integrate abyssal techniques into their combat style, initially with the intention of suggesting a lack of subtlety or technique on the marauder's part. However, the vast majority of demonic marauders found that the appellation sounded awesome and readily embraced the name. Those who chafe at the term or dislike its origin sometimes use alternatives like demonic master, which they feel better indicate their skill level.

In truth, demonic marauders possess a great deal of skill, and they wield their martial techniques with a level of artistry and joy that most other creatures don't understand. Demonic marauders sometimes explain that there's something liberating, exciting, and satisfying about taking these abilities originally forced upon their souls, oppressing them to act in a particular way, and reappropriating them to be something the marauder can truly own. This allows the marauder to come to terms with themselves in the past, present, and future and helps them understand their identity and take control of their lives.

All that said, high technical skill doesn't necessarily imply incredibly stringent standards or an ascetic lifestyle. While demonic marauders take part in rigorous training to keep their mind and body in peak condition, most do so completely on their own terms and at their own pace, relying more on instinct than they do on routine. That said, regulators are known for developing disciplined martial arts schools to practice and teach demonic marauder techniques, but they're the exception that only serves to highlight the tendencies of most other demonic marauders.

However you've done so, as a demonic marauder, you've unlocked the full martial potential of the former demonic power locked inside you or lost adrift in the afterlife after you became a renegade, and you're not going to stop until you've attained all the power you can. Whether you use that power to help others, to protect what matters to you, or to satisfy your own urges, the power itself is what's important. It's what lets you sit at the table in this world of giants and dragons and make sure your opinions and beliefs are heard. For that reason, it's a moral imperative that you achieve the highest level of power you can, so you can use it in the way you choose.

Defining Your Style

When you became a demonic marauder, you decided to reappropriate the tools of your abyssal oppression and damnation into a positive and empowering force in your life. And that means defining a style that is personal to you and distinct from all other demonic marauders. While the feats in the demonic marauder archetype are shared across those who take the archetype, much like the abyssal abilities they reflect, the way you choose to express those feats and abilities is unique to you.

For instance, one demonic marauder's rampage might be heedless, bloody stomping and crashing through friends and foes alike, while another might be graceful and deadly, moving through foes with an artistic air and no wasted movement. A marauder using the second style might call their Rampage "Dance of a Thousand Blades." Similarly, despite the name "Profane Gift," a succubus marauder might consider their gift to be one that symbolizes a level of intimacy and camaraderie that they never knew before. After all, their allies know who they are and what they can do, so they trust the succubus anyway. They might call the ability "Gift of Shared Trust" instead and emphasize the metaphysical power in their comrades' confidence that the succubus won't abuse the ability.

If you're not sure where to start in defining your own style as a demonic marauder, consider your character's theme or their visuals, whichever is easier for you to imagine. When thinking about the theme, the demonic host you chose for your character can be a great place to start. For the visuals, see if you can picture your character's attacks and fighting style. Once you have the theme or visuals down, see if you can summarize what that means for your character's fighting style. If that means you want to rename some of the feats from the archetype from your character's perspective, that's not only okay, it's probably also a good sign that you have a strong sense of your character's combat style!

Doppelborn.name: 双生替身 Doppelborn
Doppelborn.text:
变形裔是与变形怪有着强烈联系的其他族裔成员。他们天生就具备有限的变形天赋，但只要有足够的练习与努力，便能依靠自身的双重本性达成惊人的变形壮举。确实，几乎所有变形的秘密都隐藏在某个变形裔的内里深处，只是要将其显现出来，比起完整的变形怪要更困难一些。若你想扮演一名身为其他族裔成员、同时私下也会进行些许变形与冒充的角色，你就该选择变形裔。

你可能会……

  • 谨慎选择与你分享变形能力的对象，免得他人对你起疑。
  • 思索自我认同的本质，以及它相较他人更为流动的一面，并思考你的变形裔本性对你意味着什么。
  • 以各种不同的视角探索世界与其所能提供的一切；想了解一个地方，没有比用几种不同的面貌亲身体验更好的方法了。

他人多半会……

  • 除非你告诉他们，或当着他们的面使用变形，否则不会意识到你是变形裔。
  • 在了解你的言行习惯或个人信息后，担心你会变成他们的样子。
  • 甚至一开始就不知道你与变形怪有关。

外貌描述

当他们如常过着日常生活时，变形裔与其族裔的其他成员并无任何区别。不同于变形怪，变形裔的“真实形态”通常就等同于他们向世人展现的那张脸。不过，并非所有变形裔皆如此。有些变形裔身体的某些部位会在一定程度上拥有变形怪那种光滑的皮肤、柔和的肤色，或风格化的五官特征。通常，即便拥有这些特征的人，只要愿意，都能用恰到好处的衣物轻易遮掩，但若特征出现在脸上，就没那么容易了。

变形裔的出身也会影响某些生理特征。克隆变形裔与部分子嗣变形裔往往会看起来与同族裔的另一人完全一模一样；克隆者会像他们被用来克隆的对象，而子嗣则会像他们那位非变形怪的父母。克隆者的原因不言自明，但对于变形怪与凡人所生、最终成为变形裔的孩子，为何会出现这种情况，目前仍无定论。一种主要理论认为：取决于变形怪的变形天赋，其伪装或许不包含足以传递给孩子的正确遗传信息，导致孩子转而继承另一位父母的外貌，甚至近似其复制品。此理论对一些人很有吸引力，但仍无法回答所有疑问，而且若无尚未解释的次要因素，它似乎会与某些生物学机制相矛盾。看起来与别人一模一样通常不算什么大事……至少在对方不出名的情况下。若你是名人的克隆变形裔或其子嗣，旁人很可能会将你误认成你所酷似的那个人。

无面变形裔与面具变形裔虽没有这种倾向，但各自也有独特的外貌怪癖。在所有变形裔之中，无面者最可能在其“真实形态”上带有明显的视觉特征，暴露其变形裔本性——那是创造他们的过程所留下的纪念。与此同时，面具者的“真实形态”往往极其普通、毫不起眼且平平无奇。

社会

不同于龙裔后嗣、妖精后嗣、宁芙之触与黏液心，绝大多数变形裔源于变形怪与其他族裔（或变形裔彼此）之间的关系或浪漫邂逅，并由此诞下变形裔。此类变形裔也被称为“子嗣”变形裔——当人们听到变形裔传承时，最先想到的往往就是他们。当然，这并非变形怪与其他族裔成员生育时唯一可能的结果。孩子可能完全是变形怪或完全是另一族裔，也可能是除变形裔之外的其他结果。尽管如此，子嗣变形裔仍是这种本就稀有的族裔中最常见的出身。根据家庭状况，他们起初甚至可能并不知道自己是变形裔。若变形怪父母缺席，或作为另一位父母族裔成员而深度潜伏，变形裔可能会以为自己只是族裔中的普通一员（尽管也许会非常像某一位父母而不像另一位——尤其当他们属于约四分之一的子嗣变形裔，外貌如同其非变形怪父母的年轻同卵双胞胎）。在这种情况下，通常要到青春期，他们真正的力量才会显现；不过也可能更早出现，起因可能是诚挚地渴望融入、深深厌恶自己的外貌并想改变，或强烈嫉妒并渴望成为他们所认为受欢迎、成功或值得钦佩的他人。当某个触发出现时，懵懂的变形裔会经历他们的第一次变形，这可能会让他们大吃一惊。若他们唯一的倾诉对象是那位非变形怪父母，而该父母也从未意识到另一位是变形怪，那么这种变形能力将难以解释，他们可能会误以为孩子是某种术士或其他天生的施法者，且专精于变形魔法，而非正确地得出孩子是变形裔的结论。若变形怪父母坦率告知其本性，并与孩子一起诱发变形、测试孩子是否为变形裔，则子嗣变形裔能在更早的年纪学会变形；最早甚至大致在他们能用简短句子说出多种词汇时（例如，人类变形裔约在3岁左右）。

克隆变形裔则是克隆过程出错所导致的意外结果。多年来，不止一位惧死者将研究课题放在制造魔法或炼金克隆体上：这种克隆体旨在于死亡后容纳施法者或炼金术师的灵魂与意识，使其得以“免死脱身”。用于制造此类克隆体的法术与仪式确实存在，虽稀少，却仍被强大且人脉广泛者所使用。然而，它们并不总会按计划进行。制作克隆体时常用的一种材料，是从变形怪或其他变形者身上采集的物质，因为变形怪的可塑形态能很好地适应目标受体的生理、魔法与形而上印记。但若过程稍有偏差，或克隆体闲置过久，变形怪成分有时会自行适应与进化，转化并唤醒克隆体，使其以变形裔的身份获得独立人格——而非让原本计划重生于克隆体中的心智、记忆或灵魂进入其中（事实上，许多情况下原本的那个人甚至仍活得好好的）。这些克隆变形裔“出生”时便拥有青年或成年体态，具备一些事实与语言的基础知识，但没有过去人生的记忆，使他们感觉类似经历了逆行性失忆。实际上，他们的记忆运作无误；只不过在此之前他们确实几乎未曾经历任何事。克隆变形裔通常以天真无邪的初学者姿态开始人生——他们有知识却缺乏生活经验。取决于原体的形态与外貌，他们的性格可能与外表严重不符。不幸的是，若他们没能遇到善良且有耐心、能帮助他们站稳脚跟的人，周遭世界的残酷会很快击碎他们的天真。由于其变形怪部分在克隆过程中将其唤醒的方式，克隆变形裔从离开克隆槽或类似装置的那一刻起就完全具备变形能力。但许多人并不天生明白这一点；少数本能意识到自己能改变形态的，则常以为这只是任何人都能做到的正常事。因此，大多数克隆变形裔发现自身变形能力的方式，与青春期子嗣变形裔相似：某个触发事件让他们首次在潜意识中启动能力。

某些投入甚深、渴望执行渗透的变形怪，会不惜一切确保无人怀疑他们取代了熟人。这些渗透者会将原身活着关在某处，以便读取其思想，并使用误导魔法欺骗预言系的防范。但有时这仍不足以确保渗透的变形怪掌握所需的一切情报。有数位强大的变形怪各自独立发现了一些技巧：让变形怪在生理上与另一名生物连接，通过变形形成与目标生物的连体链接，从而共享该生物的思想与情绪，达成究极的深度潜伏冒充。尽管这些变形怪试图保密其技巧，至少其中之一已开始流传。当这些技巧被草率或不完美地施行时，可能会在被冒充者体内留下变形怪的一部分，使该生物得以窥见变形怪，同时也获得作为变形裔的变形能力。当然，冷酷且追求完美的变形怪有时会在任务结束后杀死他们所冒充的生物以清理尾巴；若他们知道无面变形裔可能由此产生，他们大概会更倾向这么做。“无面”一词源于此类变形裔最可能拥有风格化特征或其他生理迹象以昭示其变形裔身份，这些迹象来自与取代他们的变形怪相融合：该过程有时会“窃取”清晰的面部特征来加固变形怪的伪装，同时也夺走情绪与记忆，使变形裔的外貌与从前不同。

无面变形裔虽稀有，面具变形裔则更为罕见。有些人相信他们甚至可能暗示变形怪的起源，尽管棱魂典范与部分其他变形怪对“其族裔可能从另一个族裔的异类分支而来”的想法感到不快。面具变形裔是其他族裔中对变形魔法（或较少见地，对凡俗伪装）痴迷到极致的生物；他们“成为了面具”，并发展出变形裔的能力，往往甚至并未直接接触过变形怪。

变形裔聚居地

变形裔通常能很好地融入其族裔的其他成员，以至于他们不需要建立自己的聚居地。尽管如此，仍有些变形裔会寻找由其他变形裔与变形怪组成的社群，在那里他们觉得可以“不必戴上面具、隐藏真相”而做自己。变形裔对自身身份的感受极为多样，因此只有少数变形裔会渴望如此。事实上，对大多数变形裔而言，他们表面上所呈现的族裔成员身份就是真实；变形裔只是那份真实的一小部分，他们并不认为它重要到足以定义自己。希望建立组织或聚居地的棱魂典范、阴谋家与其他变形怪，几乎总是乐于张开双臂欢迎变形裔。至于只推崇“纯正变形怪”的至上团体则寥寥无几，而且他们的行为通常另有原因：可能部分情有可原（例如对变形怪深度歧视的反应，促使他们抱团取暖），也可能完全卑劣（例如排斥变形裔，因为他们担心变形裔会背叛该阴谋组织正酝酿的、针对其他族裔的邪恶计划）。

阵营与宗教

大多数变形裔并没有超出其族裔之外的强烈阵营倾向。面具者因其对变形与伪装的执念而往往偏向中立；克隆者通常十分容易受影响，会模仿最先找到他们的导师形象（或在导师出现之前，向压迫者学习暴力）。

拥有坦率变形怪父母的子嗣变形裔与面具者，常崇拜与变形怪相似的神祇类型，包括变形者或诡计者，例如阿拉卡尔的女神Sewa。其他变形裔在宗教方面并无超出其族裔常态的特殊倾向。

名字

子嗣变形裔通常使用其族裔常见的名字，除非其变形怪父母选择给予他们变形怪风格的名字。克隆者要么自行取名，要么由收养或指导他们的人命名。无面者总是拥有其族裔的常见名字，除非他们选择改名以反映自己成为变形裔后的感受。面具者往往在成为面具之时已经忘了本名；即便没有，他们也更偏好使用化名或非常普通的名字。

示例名字

Bob, Connor, Facade, Jane, Nameless, Outis, Rei, Rin, Twilight.

变形裔冒险者

变形裔偶尔会成为冒险者，通常会选择与变形怪相同的职业与背景，因为他们的冒充能力给予他们相同的优势。他们常是游荡者、吟游诗人，以及其他基于魅力的施法者，例如某些类型的灵能者。典型背景包括艺术家、理发师、酒保、江湖骗子、罪犯、侦探、艺人、占卜师、商人、贵族、破坏者、仆役或街头孤儿。

变形裔（稀有传承）

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.sAzY5c0THzniAeSU]{变形裔}

无论你是变形怪或变形裔的子嗣、其变形怪成分进化的克隆体、强大变形怪身份窃取魔法的受害者，或是戴过太多伪装以至于成为面具的人，你都是部分变形怪，同时也仍属于你的其他族裔。除了你族裔带来的特征外，你获得变形裔特征。你的变形裔变形能力让你能轻松将自身形态变为各种类人生物伪装。你不需要易容工具包即可进行 Impersonate。不同于完整的变形怪，你没有“偏好形态”。你可以在1分钟内 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} 任意小型或中型类人生物形态。当你以这种方式伪装时，你的 Impersonate 动作获得奥术与变化系特征。不同于普通变形怪的 Change Shape，它不会获得变形（特征），因为那会使你难以使用其他变形效果。你可以用单动作返回你的自然形态。

族裔专长

以下族裔专长可供变形裔选择。变形裔只有一个仅他们能选择的族裔专长，但他们能解锁下方“额外专长”中列出的绝大多数变形怪族裔专长的潜能。

额外专长

1级: @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.2kR3d4UZDkeU7anX]{黑暗视界伪装}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.tMaEsLtsrEvJYR9s]{变形怪学识}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RoZKqRkvjR4dOwdo]{变形者之舌}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.scwc8liB6xUBkrDI]{微小变形}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.d6YvUhCtKYBaPvYa]{变形感知}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.Iy1lb3HyuIHjP5y9]{异常变形}

5级: @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.2w0wmthSMtLanVEA]{水栖（特征）伪装}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.2t8Qkiq2KL7xZjZJ]{Change Shape（变形怪）}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.oOg9zq7HpYcw0l26]{变形怪时尚}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.9cIg9Kj7zEsYDIiF]{装得像}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.zIZUvyTfoRoqpbwA]{嗅觉伪装}

9级: @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.86IsrzXa5kPRDgdR]{攀升伪装}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.GchJThmcDFcGHAzX]{强效黑暗视界伪装}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.M6YUi1hM0t2IvPw9]{读心者}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.MXun4NFvwgAO0iax]{精炼 Change Shape}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.OWe9ac4oOXEFSeCw]{复苏变形}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.Wg5072J51SxbqyOt]{翱翔伪装}

1级

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.J4QM9xN4o6mH8fe5]{变形裔的伪装}

Doppelborn are members of other ancestries with strong connections to doppelgangers. They innately possess limited shapeshifting talents, but with sufficient practice and effort, they can rely on their dual nature to achieve great feats of shapeshifting. Indeed, just about all of the secrets of shapeshifting are hidden within a doppelborn somewhere under the surface. It's just a little harder to manifest them than it is for a full doppelganger. If you want to play a character who engages in a bit of shapeshifting and impersonation on the side while being a member of another ancestry, you should play a doppelborn.

You Might...

  • Choose who you share your shapeshifting abilities with wisely, lest others become suspicious of you.
  • Wonder about the nature of your identity and its fluidity compared to other people, and what your doppelborn nature means to you.
  • Explore the world and all it has to offer, from a variety of different points of view; there's no better way to learn about a place than experiencing it in a few different guises.

Others Probably...

  • Don't realize you're a doppelborn unless you tell them or use your shapeshifting right in front of them.
  • Worry that you might take their form after learning their mannerisms or personal information.
  • Aren't even aware that you're a doppelganger in the first place.

Physical Description

When they're going about their daily lives as normal, nothing distinguishes a doppelborn from any other member of their ancestry. Unlike a doppelganger, a doppelborn's "true form" normally is the same as the face they show to the world. That's not true for all doppelborn, however. Some possess the smooth skin, subdued skin tones, or stylized features of doppelgangers on certain parts of their body, at least to some extent. Normally, even those who do possess such features can easily hide them with a well-placed article of clothing, if they so choose, but it isn't as easy if the feature is somewhere on their face.

There's a few physical characteristics that depend on the doppelborn's origin as well. Cloned doppelborn and some child doppelborn have a tendency to look like exact duplicates of another member of the same ancestry; either the person they cloned for a clone or their non-doppelganger parent for a child. The reason is self-evident for clones, but there hasn't been a conclusive answer as to why this might occur for the children of doppelgangers and mortals who become doppelborn. One leading theory is that, depending on the doppelganger's shapeshifting talents, the doppelganger's disguise might not contain the right kind of genetic information to pass on to a child, causing the child to instead inherit a duplicate of the other parent's appearance. This theory is appealing to some, but it doesn't answer all the questions and seems to contradict some of the biology involved without a secondary as-yet-unexplained factor. Looking exactly the same as someone else is normally not a big deal... if the other person isn't famous, at least. Being a doppelborn clone or child of someone famous is sure to have the doppelborn mistaken for the one they resemble so vividly.

While faceless and mask doppelborn don't have this same tendency, they each have their own quirks of appearance. Faceless are the most likely among all doppelborn to have distinctive visual features in their "true form" that give away their doppelborn nature, mementos of the process that created them. Meanwhile, masks tend to have a "true form" that is incredibly generic, nondescript, and average.

Society

Unlike draconic scions, faerie scions, nymphtouched, and slimehearts, the majority of doppelborn arise from relationships or romantic liaisons between doppelgangers and other ancestries (or among doppelborn) giving birth to doppelborn. Also known as "child" doppelborn, they're the doppelborn everyone thinks of when they hear about the doppelborn heritage. Of course, they're not the only possible outcome when a doppelganger and a member of another ancestry have a child together. The child could be fully a doppelganger or member of the other ancestry, or they could be something else besides a doppelborn. Nonetheless, child doppelborn are the most common origin for an already rare ancestry. Depending on the situation with their family, they might not even realize that they're a doppelborn at first. If the doppelganger parent is absent or remains in deep cover as a member of the other parent's ancestry, a doppelborn might assume that they're an ordinary member of their ancestry (albeit perhaps one who takes remarkably after one of their two parents and not the other, if they are one of the roughly one in four child doppelborn who look like younger identical twins of their non-doppelganger parent). In that case, it usually won't be until adolescence that their true power emerges, though it can come along earlier due to an earnest wish to fit in, a deep loathing of their appearance and a desire to change it, or a strong envy and desire to be someone else they perceive as popular, successful, or otherwise admirable. When a trigger emerges, the ignorant doppelborn experiences their first shift, which might come as quite a surprise. If they only have their non-doppelganger parent as a confidant, and that parent never realized the other was a doppelganger, this shapeshifting power might be difficult to explain, and they might mistakenly conclude that the child is some kind of sorcerer or other innate inborn spellcaster specializing in shapeshifting magic, rather than correctly conclude that the child is a doppelborn. With a doppelganger parent who is upfront about their nature and works with the child to induce shapeshifting and test to see if the child is a doppelborn, a child doppelborn can learn to shift at a much earlier age, with the earliest being roughly around the same time they become able to speak a variety of words in short sentences (for instance, around the age of 3 for a human doppelborn).

Cloned doppelborn are an unexpected result of a cloning process gone awry. The creation of magical or alchemical clones meant to house a spellcaster or alchemist's soul and consciousness after death in order to provide them a way to "get out of death free" has been the research project of more than one thanatophobe over the years. Spells and rituals to create such clones exist, though rare, and remain in use by the powerful and well-connected. However, they don't always go as planned. One of the ingredients often used in clones is material harvested from a doppelganger or other shapeshifter, since the doppelganger's morphic form is able to adapt well to match the intended recipient's biological, magical, and metaphysical signatures. But when the process is slightly off, or a clone lies unused for too long, sometimes the doppelganger component can adapt and evolve, transforming and awakening the clone to their own distinct personality as a doppelborn, without the mind, memories, or soul intended to be reborn into the clone (indeed, in many cases, the original is still very much alive). These cloned doppelborn, are born fully-formed in a young adult or adult body with some basic knowledge of facts and language but no memory of their past life, causing them to feel similar to someone experiencing retrograde amnesia. In truth, their memory is working just fine; they just really haven't experienced anything up until this point. Cloned doppelborn generally begin their life as naive ingenues, as they're possessed with knowledge but no life experience. Depending on the original's form and appearance, this personality might be quite a mismatch for their looks. Unfortunately, the cruelties of the world around them can quickly disabuse them of their naivete if they don't happen to encounter someone kind and patient who can help them get on their feet. Because of the way their doppelganger parts awakened them from the cloning process, cloned doppelborn are fully capable of shapeshifting from the moment they emerge from the cloning vat or other similar apparatus. But many of them don't innately understand that fact, while those few that do inherently recognize they can change forms often assume that it's something normal that anyone can do. Thus, most cloned doppelborn discover their shapeshifting abilities in a manner similar to an adolescent child doppelborn, when a trigger event causes them to activate their ability subconsciously for the very first time.

Some particularly invested doppelgangers who wish to perform an infiltration go to great extents to make sure no one will ever suspect that they've replaced someone they know. These infiltrators keep the original alive somewhere where they can read their thoughts and use misdirection magic to fool divinatory precautions. But sometimes that's not enough to ensure the infiltrating doppelganger has all the information they need. Several powerful doppelgangers independently discovered techniques allowing doppelgangers to connect themselves physically to another creature, shapeshifting a conjoined link to the creature in question, in order to share in the creature's thoughts and emotions and perform the ultimate deep cover impersonation. While these doppelgangers attempted to keep their techniques secret, at least one of them has started to spread. And when they're performed haphazardly or imperfectly, they can leave a piece of the doppelganger within the impersonated subject, allowing that creature some insight into the doppelganger, as well as shapeshifting abilities as a doppelborn. Of course, ruthless and perfectionist doppelgangers sometimes kill off the creature they were impersonating when the job is done to clear up loose ends, and they'd probably become more likely to do so if they knew of the possibility for faceless doppelborn to arise in that way. The term "faceless" comes from the fact that these types of doppelborn are the most likely to possess stylized features or other physical indicators of being a doppelborn, due to the melding with the doppelganger that replaced them: the process sometimes "steals" the defined features to shore up the doppelganger's disguise, along with the emotions and memories, leaving the doppelborn with a different appearance than before.

While faceless doppelborn are rare, mask doppelborn are even rarer still. Some believe they might even hold a hint to doppelgangers' origins, though prismsoul exemplars and some other doppelgangers chafe at the idea that their ancestry might have branched from unusual members of another ancestry. Mask doppelborn are creatures of other ancestries so obsessed with shapeshifting magic (or, rarely, mundane disguises), that they "become the mask" and develop the capabilities of a doppelborn, often without any direct exposure to doppelgangers.

Doppelborn Settlements

Doppelborn generally blend in well with other members of their ancestry, enough that they don't need to create their own settlements. Nonetheless, some doppelborn seek out communities with other doppelborn and doppelgangers where they feel they can "be themselves" without putting on a mask and hiding their truth. Doppelborn are extremely diverse in their feelings about their identities, and so this is something a minority of doppelborn desire. Indeed, for most doppelborn, the member of their ancestry they appear to be on the surface is their truth, and being a doppelborn is only a small part of that truth, one that they don't consider to be relevant enough to define them. Prismsoul exemplars, conspirators, and other doppelgangers hoping to build up organizations or settlements are almost always happy to welcome doppelborn with open arms. The groups of doppelgangers who are supremacists for "true doppelgangers" only are few and far between, and they typically have another reason for their actions, whether it be partially sympathetic (like a reaction to deep discrimination against doppelgangers causing them to circle the wagons) or fully reprehensible (like excluding doppelborn because they worry doppelborn might betray a vile scheme the conspiracy is hatching against other ancestries).

Alignment and Religion

Most doppelborn don't have any particularly strong alignment tendencies beyond that of their ancestry. Masks, with their obsessive shapeshifting and disguises, tend to be neutral, and clones are usually impressionable enough to take after a mentor figure who finds them first (or to learn violence from an oppressor who appears before a mentor does).

Child doppelborn with open doppelganger parents and masks often worship the same sorts of deities as doppelgangers, including shapeshifters or tricksters like the goddess Sewa on Alacar. Other doppelborn don't have any particular religious tendencies beyond that of any other member of their ancestry.

Names

Child doppelborn typically have normal names for their ancestry, unless their doppelganger parent chooses to give them a doppelganger-style name. Clones either choose their own name or have a name given by whoever adopted or mentored them. Faceless always have a normal name for their ancestry, unless they choose to change their name to reflect the way they feel after becoming a doppelborn. Masks have often forgotten their own name by the time they became the mask, and even if they haven't, they prefer using pseudonyms or very generic names.

Sample Names

Bob, Connor, Facade, Jane, Nameless, Outis, Rei, Rin, Twilight.

Doppelborn Adventurers

Doppelborn occasionally become adventurers, typically choosing the exact same classes and backgrounds as doppelgangers do, as their abilities at impersonation grant them the same advantages. They're often rogues, bards, and other Charisma-based spellcasters such as certain types of psychic. Typical backgrounds include artist, barber, barkeep, charlatan, criminal, detective, entertainer, fortune teller, merchant, noble, saboteur, servant, or street urchin.

Doppelborn (Rare Heritage)

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.sAzY5c0THzniAeSU]{Doppelborn}

Whether you're the child of a doppelganger or doppelborn, a clone whose doppelganger components evolved, a victim of a powerful doppelganger's identity theft magic, or someone who took on so many disguises that you became the mask, you are part doppelganger, in addition to your other ancestry. You gain the doppelborn trait in addition to the traits from your ancestry. Your doppelborn shapeshifting allows you to shift your form into various humanoid disguises with ease. You don't need a disguise kit to Impersonate. Unlike a full doppelganger, you don't have a "preferred form." You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} any Small or Medium humanoid form in 1 minute. When you disguise in this way, your Impersonate action gains the arcane and transmutation traits. Unlike normal doppelgangers' Change Shape, it doesn't gain the polymorph trait, as that would make it difficult to use other polymorph effects. You can return to your natural form with a single action.

Ancestry Feats

The following ancestry feats are available to doppelborn. Doppelborn have only a single ancestry feat uniquely available only to them, but they unlock the potential to the vast majority of doppelganger ancestry feats, listed below in Additional Feats.

Additional Feats

1st: @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.2kR3d4UZDkeU7anX]{Darksight Disguise}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.tMaEsLtsrEvJYR9s]{Doppelganger Lore}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.RoZKqRkvjR4dOwdo]{Shifter's Tongue}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.scwc8liB6xUBkrDI]{Tiny Shift}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.d6YvUhCtKYBaPvYa]{Transformation Sense}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.Iy1lb3HyuIHjP5y9]{Unusual Shift}

5th: @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.2w0wmthSMtLanVEA]{Aquatic Disguise}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.2t8Qkiq2KL7xZjZJ]{Change Shape (Doppelganger)}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.oOg9zq7HpYcw0l26]{Doppelganger's Fashion}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.9cIg9Kj7zEsYDIiF]{Fake It}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.zIZUvyTfoRoqpbwA]{Olfactory Disguise}

9th: @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.86IsrzXa5kPRDgdR]{Ascending Disguise}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.GchJThmcDFcGHAzX]{Greater Darksight Disguise}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.M6YUi1hM0t2IvPw9]{Mind Reader}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.MXun4NFvwgAO0iax]{Perfected Change Shape}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.OWe9ac4oOXEFSeCw]{Rejuvenating Shapeshifting}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.Wg5072J51SxbqyOt]{Soaring Disguise}

1st Level

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.J4QM9xN4o6mH8fe5]{Doppelborn's Disguise}

Nymphtouched.name: 宁芙眷顾 Nymphtouched
Nymphtouched.text:
宁芙触及者是各种族裔中被宁芙的原初魔法所触碰的人。与其族裔中的其他成员相比，他们拥有与自然世界的连结，以及一种超凡脱俗的美丽，使他们既不完全是宁芙，也不完全是凡人。因此，宁芙触及者可以作为凡人世界与隐居的自然妖精之间的桥梁，但他们必须在这两个世界之间找到属于自己的位置。他们的力量与夺目的外表使他们鹤立鸡群，不论是好是坏。如果你想扮演一个并非宁芙、却能召唤她们自然辉煌要素的角色，你就应该选择宁芙触及者。

你可能会……

  • 游走在凡人世界与自然秘境之间的界线上。
  • 对你的宁芙血脉所体现的那类自然有一种与生俱来的连结。
  • 寻求了解更多关于宁芙与其他妖精的知识。

其他人很可能会……

  • 钦佩你的魔法力量或与众不同的外表。
  • 请求你介绍你的宁芙父母，即使你可能并没有。
  • 难以分辨你与一位化为类人生物形态的宁芙之间的差别。

外貌描述

宁芙触及者看起来像其族裔中美丽或醒目的成员，同时带有与其宁芙血脉相似的特征，可能很细微也可能很显著。究竟哪些特征对应其血脉，在不同宁芙触及者之间差异极大，且无法事先预测。潜在的宁芙特征不仅因宁芙触及者而异，也会因血脉而异。

微风触及者——那些被奥莱或未驯之风所触碰的人——常常拥有轻盈的特征、被风拂乱的头发，以及如奥莱般淡雅的肤色。

洞窟触及者——那些被拉姆帕德或未探索的洞窟所触碰的人——可能拥有灰色皮肤、身上长出细小水晶、白色或粉彩色头发，或如拉姆帕德般泪白的眼睛。

湖水触及者——那些被奈伊阿德或澄澈淡水水域所触碰的人——可能拥有如水般颜色的皮肤、眼睛或头发，甚至会显得湿润，或仿佛浸透了水分。

草甸触及者——那些被埃皮梅利德或繁茂的草地与果园所触碰的人——可能拥有草绿色或沃土褐的头发与眼睛，甚至如同埃皮梅利德一般，身上长出些许草叶、泥浆或土壤。

星辰触及者——那些被阿斯特里艾或高空星座所触碰的人——往往拥有如夜空般深色的皮肤，以及银蓝色的眼睛或头发。他们甚至可能在身体上散布银蓝色星辰般的星座图样，或在头发与眼睛中闪烁微光。

暮光触及者个体——受赫斯珀里德或偏远之地落日之美影响者——经常呈现落日色的头发与眼睛。有时他们的身体也带有一种或多种旋涡般的落日色彩，而他们的眼睛、头发或身体甚至可能发光。

酒意触及者——那些被迈那德或纯粹自然毒素之地所触碰的人——通常拥有酒红色的血管，以及略为尖锐的牙齿或指甲。有时他们的头发间会长出葡萄藤。

林木触及者——那些被德律阿德或古老树木所触碰的人——常常拥有树皮色的皮肤或绿色头发。有时他们甚至会从身体上长出枝条、叶片或花朵，且眼睛会与花朵颜色相配。林木触及者拥有德律阿德那种会在秋季变色、冬季脱落的叶状头发是很稀有的。

社会

人们喜欢想象宁芙与凡人之间的罗曼史——或许原因不言自明——但所谓的“宁芙亲族”，即生理上拥有宁芙祖先的子女、孙辈，或隔代返祖者，只是成为宁芙触及者的几条途径之一，而且未必是最常见的。另一方面，在宁芙漫游者之中——她们本身就是稀有度——与凡人相爱并组建家庭并不算特别罕见。即便是留在自身守护地的宁芙，也可能在那里遇到浪漫伴侣：或是相伴一段时间后分离，或是立誓共同守护那片守护地。一些极其稀有的宁芙甚至可能为了与其凡人家人相伴而成为漫游者。宁芙亲族更可能源自埃皮梅利德（她们本就生活在田园般的凡人社群之中）与奈伊阿德（她们无需成为漫游者也更容易离开守护地进行旅行）。赫斯珀里德则属于最不可能的父母之一，因为她们倾向于自我隔绝以守护宝藏，但即便如此，她们有时也会与一条盟友金龙组建家庭，这可能诞生宁芙触及者巨龙或龙裔苗裔宁芙。

在未来世代中源自宁芙亲族的后裔，可能更像其族裔中的典型成员，但倾向于觉醒带有宁芙血脉的术士力量。虽然罕见，但一个家族谱系中也可能包含多个不同传承的宁芙。当两位宁芙亲族相遇时，共享如此稀有的共同点可能建立某种联系或亲密感，并进一步发展。因此，宁芙亲族有可能同时具备多个宁芙传承的一些外在特征，尽管他们仍会选择一个血统来决定宁芙专长的效果，以及他们能选择哪一种血统专长。

受启者是因宁芙的启迪或影响而发生转化的宁芙触及者。成为受启宁芙触及者的最经典故事，是一名或多名狂欢者追随一位迈那德，连续数日沉溺于迈那德狂野鲁莽的酒神狂欢，直到他们再也不复从前。其他传承的宁芙也有类似故事，例如英雄被奈伊阿德引诱进入池塘后再也未被见到——据推测，他成为了一名受启的湖水触及者。尽管这些特定传说有时带有危险或警示的意味，但在大多数情况下，受启者会因这份启迪的赋礼而感到荣幸与受祝福。比如，一位在强大哈玛德律阿德的林荫幽居中钻研原初魔法数十年的德鲁伊，最终可能成为一名受启的林木触及者；又或者，一位在其一生中由阿斯特里艾缪斯提供超凡灵感的吟游诗人，可能成为一名受启的星辰触及者。成为受启的宁芙触及者可以发生在生物生命中的任何时刻，因此角色也可能依其故事发展而重训成这一传承。

羁绊宁芙触及者与受启者相对应，但他们并非直接与宁芙建立连结，而是与宁芙的守护地、失去宁芙的守护地，或一片具有初生潜力、可能成为守护地区域的自然之地建立连结。通常而言，没有宁芙的守护地或潜在守护地能够自行孕育宁芙；但有时，另一个族裔的生物已与该守护地建立强烈羁绊，紧密到守护地将该生物视为最亲密的知己，于是把原本用于创造宁芙的能量转而灌注给该生物。这会为守护地节省相当多的原初能量，并可能产生一位同样忠诚、却比幼年守护地通常所拥有的守护者强大得多的守护者。此过程也不只发生在普通族裔成员身上。任何类型的生物都可能以类似方式获得一小部分宁芙的力量——从独角兽到奇美拉，再到巨蛇皆有可能。

三种起源的宁芙触及者都可能加深他们与自然世界的连结，不过这在受启者或羁绊者中远比在宁芙亲族中常见。当这种情况发生时，宁芙触及者要么完全与某处守护地调谐并成为宁芙，要么尝试调谐却在过程中大部分失败，成为宁芙漫游者。这与重训相似：以宁芙作为新的族裔，而其宁芙传承与其宁芙血脉相匹配，而非宁芙触及者。有些传说甚至称这一过程会以更大规模发生：一个在大森林边缘苦苦挣扎的整座村庄消失无踪，被森林吞没，而取而代之的是一片德律阿德林地。

阵营与宗教

宁芙触及者往往会轻微地倾向于与其宁芙血脉相契合的阵营，但通常这种倾向相当温和，尤其对宁芙亲族而言。在所有宁芙触及者中，受启者最有可能与启迪他们的宁芙阵营一致，但即便如此也并非总是如此。羁绊者则介于两者之间：他们往往因自身原本就具备某些与其所羁绊守护地产生共鸣的特质而成为羁绊者，但阵营未必是这种相容性的关键组成部分。

宁芙触及者并不会因其传承而被锁定信仰，但那些想与自身根源连结的人往往崇拜自然本身，或信奉基于自然的信仰与宗教，例如阿拉卡尔的艾尔德。他们也可能崇拜代表某种与其关联宁芙守护地相契合概念的神祇，例如阿拉卡尔星辰触及者可能崇拜虚空神祇库乌。最后，他们也可能崇拜来自仙灵诸界的强大妖精神祇。

名字

宁芙触及者通常拥有对其族裔其他成员而言似乎很典型的名字。尤其是，除非他们在成为宁芙触及者后改名，否则受启与羁绊的宁芙触及者会使用在他们尚未成为宁芙触及者之前就已被赋予的名字。有时他们会根据新的传承做出调整或添加称号。例如，一个名叫Crys的人在成为洞窟触及者后，身体上长出晶体纹路，可能会把名字改为Crystal；又或者，一位林木触及者可能在名字末尾加上“被橡树拥抱者”。宁芙亲族可能由父母赋予一个让人联想到宁芙名字的名字，而宁芙父母有时给孩子取的名字则完全不像自己的名字，反而随其一时兴致而定。例如，一位与酿酒师组建家庭的迈那德，可能会用自己最喜欢的酒精饮品来为孩子命名。

示例名字

Amphitrite, Crystal, Ornato Embraced by the Oak, Green Willow, Lysianassa, Sangria.

宁芙触及者（稀有传承）

无论你是宁芙的后裔、被宁芙启迪，还是被她们守护地的力量所灌注，你都拥有一小部分宁芙的力量。你获得宁芙触及者特征，此外还保有来自你族裔的特征。你还获得来自宁芙族裔的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.wUCMUSk7IIsshmyd]{Unearthly Beauty} 能力。每当你获得一个族裔专长时，你可以从宁芙触及者专长以及你族裔的专长中选择。你从宁芙族裔的传承列表中选择一个血统，用以决定你的外貌，并决定你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.ZMRvQJPM3bbSrKbw]{Nymph Strikes} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.OtYHe1QKUgqHG1DJ]{Nymph Shot} 专长，以及其他会依宁芙传承而获得不同增益的专长中得到的好处。这并不允许你选择需要特定传承作为先决条件的专长，除非你先选择对应的血统专长。

族裔专长

以下族裔专长可供宁芙触及者选择。宁芙触及者只有少量专属族裔专长，但他们能解锁绝大多数宁芙族裔专长，列于下方“额外专长”。带有传承先决条件的额外专长要求宁芙触及者选择相应的血统专长。宁芙触及者不具备成为宁芙女王的资格。然而，由于他们有时能加深与自然的连结并成为宁芙，因此宁芙触及者可以重训成宁芙，继而成为宁芙女王。

Nymphtouched are people of various ancestries touched by the primal magic of nymphs. Compared to other members of their ancestry, they possess a connection to the natural world and an otherworldly beauty that marks them as not quite nymphs yet nor quite mortals. For this reason, a nymphtouched can serve to bridge the gap between the mortal world and the reclusive nature fey, but they must find their own place between those worlds. Their powers and striking appearance single them out, for better or for worse. If you want to play a character who isn't a nymph but calls upon elements of their natural splendor, you should play a nymphtouched.

You Might...

  • Straddle the line between the mortal world and the secret places of nature.
  • Feel an innate connection to the types of nature embodied by your nymph lineage.
  • Seek to learn more about nymphs and other fey.

Others Probably...

  • Admire your magical powers or distinctive appearance.
  • Ask to be introduced to your nymph parent, even though you might not have one.
  • Have difficulty distinguishing you from a nymph taking humanoid form.

Physical Description

Nymphtouched look like beautiful or striking members of their ancestry with features resembling their nymph lineage, either minor or major. Exactly which features correspond to their lineage varies greatly from nymphtouched to nymphtouched, and it's not possible to predict in advance. Potential nymph features vary not only from nymphtouched to nymphtouched but also from lineage to lineage.

Breezetouched, those touched by aurai or untamed winds, often have airy features, windswept hair, and pale coloration like aurai.

Caverntouched, those touched by lampads or unexplored caverns, might have gray skin, small crystals on their body, white or pastel hair, or teary white eyes, much like a lampad.

Laketouched, those touched by naiads or bodies of pristine fresh water, might have skin, eyes, or hair colored like water or even moist or infused with water.

Meadowtouched, those touched by epimelides or lush meadows and orchards, might have hair and eyes with grass green or rich soil brown colors, or even some grass, mud, or soil growing from their bodies, like an epimelid.

Startouched, those touched by asteriai or the constellations above, tend to have skin as dark as the night sky and eyes or hair of silvery-blue. They might even have constellations of silvery-blue stars across their body or sparkles in their hair or eyes.

Twilighttouched individuals, influenced by hesperides or the beauty of the sunset in remote locations, frequently exhibit sunset-colored hair and eyes. Occasionally, their body also shares one or more swirling sunset colors, and their eyes, hair, or body might even glow.

Winetouched, those touched by maenads or the places of pure natural poison, typically have winecolored veins and slightly sharper teeth or fingernails. They sometimes have grapevines growing throughout their hair.

Woodtouched, those touched by dryads or ancient trees, often have bark-colored skin or green hair. Sometimes, they even have branches, leaves, or flowers growing from their body and eyes that match their flowers' colors. It's rare for a woodtouched to possess a dryad's leaflike hair that changes colors in the autumn and falls out in the winter.

Society

People love to imagine a romance between a nymph and a mortal, perhaps for obvious reasons, but so-called nymph kin, the children, grandchildren, or atavistic throwbacks of biological nymph ancestors are only one of several paths to become nymphtouched, and not necessarily the most common. On the other hand, among nymph wanderers—themselves a rarity—it's not especially unusual to fall in love with a mortal and start a family. Even nymphs who stay with their wards might meet a romantic partner there, either staying together for a time before parting, or perhaps vowing to protect the ward together. Some extremely rare nymphs might even become wanderers in order to stay with their mortal family. Nymph kin are more likely to descend from epimelides, who live among pastoral mortal communities in the first place, and naiads, who can travel from their ward more easily without becoming wanderers. Hesperides are among the least likely parents, as they tend to isolate themselves to guard their treasures, but even they sometimes form families with an allied gold dragon, which can produce nymphtouched dragons or draconic scion nymphs.

Those who descend from nymph kin in future generations might be more typical members of their ancestry with a tendency to awakening sorcerous powers with the nymph bloodline. While it's rare, it's possible for a family tree to include multiple nymphs of different heritages. When two nymph kin meet, sharing such a rare thing in common can establish a certain connection or intimacy, which can lead further. As a result, it's possible for a nymph kin to possess some physical features of multiple nymph heritages, though they still choose one lineage to determine the effects of nymph feats and which lineage feat they can take.

Inspired are nymphtouched who were transformed due to a nymph's inspiration or influence. The most classic tale of becoming an inspired nymphtouched is that of one or more revelers who follow after a maenad, indulging in the maenad's wild reckless bacchanalia for days on end, until they're never the same again. Similar stories exist for nymphs of other heritages, such as tales of a hero tempted into a pond by naiads and then never seen again, presumably having become an inspired laketouched. While those particular tales sometimes take on a dangerous or cautionary light, in most cases, inspired feel honored and blessed by the gift of inspiration. For instance, a druid who studies primal magic in the bower of a powerful hamadryad for decades might eventually become an inspired woodtouched, while a bard with an asteria muse providing otherworldly inspiration over the course of their lifetime might become an inspired startouched. Becoming an inspired nymphtouched is something that can happen at any point in a creature's life, so it's possible to retrain into one as a character's story dictates.

Bonded nymphtouched are parallel to inspired, but instead of making a connection with a nymph directly, they do so with a nymph's ward, a ward that lost its nymph, or an area of nature with the nascent potential to become a ward. Ordinarily, a ward or potential ward without a nymph is capable of birthing a nymph directly on its own, but sometimes, a creature of another ancestry already has a strong bond with that ward, closely enough that the ward recognizes that creature as its closest confidante, and sends the energy that would have gone to creating a nymph into the creature instead. This saves the ward quite a bit of primal energy, and it can result in a guardian that is equally loyal but much more powerful than a young ward would ordinarily possess. This process doesn't only occur with members of ordinary ancestries, either. Any sort of creature might come to possess a fraction of a nymph's power in a similar way, from a unicorn to a chimera to a great serpent.

Nymphtouched of any of the three origins can potentially deepen their connection to the natural world, though it's far more common for inspired or bonded nymphtouched than for nymph kin. When this happens, the nymphtouched either attunes fully to a ward completely, becoming a nymph, or attempts to attune but fails most of the way through the process, becoming a nymph wanderer. This works similarly to retraining, with nymph as their new ancestry, and the nymph heritage matching their nymph lineage instead of nymphtouched. Some tales even tell of the process working on a larger scale, with an entire struggling village on the edge of a great wood disappearing, swallowed up by the forest, and a grove of dryads arising in its place.

Alignment and Religion

Nymphtouched tend slightly toward an alignment in touch with their nymph lineage, but it's typically quite mild, especially for nymph kin. Of all nymphtouched, inspired are most likely to match the alignment of the nymph who inspired them, though even then, that's not always the case. Bonded nymphtouched are in between the two, as they tend to become bonded due to already possessing some qualities that resonated with the ward to which they bonded in the first place, but alignment isn't necessarily an important component of that compatibility.

Nymphtouched aren't locked into their faith based on their heritage, but those who want to connect to their roots often worship nature itself, or ascribe to naturebased faiths and religions such as the Eld on Alacar. They also might worship deities representing a concept in tune with their associated nymph's ward, like Kuu the deity of the void for a startouched on Alacar. Lastly, they might worship powerful fey deities from the faerie realms.

Names

Nymphtouched usually have names that seem typical for other members of their ancestry. In particular, unless they change their name after becoming nymphtouched, inspired and bonded nymphtouched have names given to them from before they were nymphtouched at all. Sometimes they'll make an adjustment or add an epithet based on their new heritage. For instance, someone named Crys who became a caverntouched with crystalline patterns growing on their body might change their name to Crystal, or a woodtouched might add "Embraced by the Oak" to the end of their name. Nymph kin might be given a name reminiscent of a nymph name by their parents, and nymph parents sometimes give their children names that don't resemble their own at all but instead follow their own flights of fancy. For instance, a maenad who formed a family with a vintner might name their child after their favorite alcohol.

Sample Names

Amphitrite, Crystal, Ornato Embraced by the Oak, Green Willow, Lysianassa, Sangria.

Nymphtouched (Rare Heritage)

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-heritages.Item.VhKU0B5OP2BGSI2p]{Nymphtouched}

Whether you're descended from nymphs, inspired by nymphs, or infused with the power of their wards, you possess a fraction of a nymph's power. You gain the nymphtouched trait in addition to the traits from your ancestry. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-features.Item.wUCMUSk7IIsshmyd]{Unearthly Beauty} ability from the nymph ancestry. You can choose from nymphtouched feats and feats from your ancestry whenever you gain an ancestry feat. Select a lineage from the list of heritages for the nymph ancestry, in order to determine your physical appearance and determine the benefit you gain from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.ZMRvQJPM3bbSrKbw]{Nymph Strikes} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.OtYHe1QKUgqHG1DJ]{Nymph Shot} feats, and other feats that grant benefits depending on nymph heritage. This doesn't allow you to take feats that require a specific heritage as a prerequisite, unless you first take the appropriate lineage feat.

Ancestry Feats

The following ancestry feats are available to nymphtouched. Nymphtouched have only a few exclusive ancestry feats, but they unlock the vast majority of nymph ancestry feats, listed below in Additional Feats. Additional feats with a heritage prerequisite require a nymphtouched to take the associated lineage feat. Nymphtouched don't possess the qualifications to become nymph queens. However, since they can sometimes deepen their connection to nature and become nymphs, it's possible for a nymphtouched to retrain into a nymph, and then become a nymph queen.

Nymph Queen Archetype.name: 宁芙女王变体 Nymph Queen Archetype
Nymph Queen Archetype.text:
世界上许多最美丽、最原始的自然之地都有一个共同点：它们都是由一种被称为宁芙女王的强大妖精所统治的领地。对普通的宁芙而言，成为女王几乎是一种梦想。这种王室身份意味着她们与自身守护地的羁绊得以延伸：随着领土不断扩张，越来越广阔的地域会被纳入她们的守护地之中，直到最终覆盖整个区域。经过数千年的成长与对领土的悉心守护，尤其强大的宁芙女王会统治绵延于广袤大地之上的巨大森林或山脉。

这些经典的宁芙女王必须谨慎地与其不断扩张的领土内的其他妖精交涉，以赢得它们作为侍从的效忠；否则，就只能凭借纯粹的魅力、力量或威吓来约束它们。即使该地区的其他妖精会依据自己对新宁芙女王的看法而迁徙他处，随着宁芙女王的宫廷与领地壮大，其中通常也会纳入越来越多其他宁芙的守护地。若那些宁芙在心中并未真正承认女王为宗主，那么女王通常就不可能将那名宁芙的守护地吸收进自己的领土。这会引发多种不同局面。最常见的两种可能是：女王的领土在那个方向停止增长，或是领土绕开那名抗拒的宁芙的守护地继续扩张，于是留下一个被女王领地包围的小小区域。然而，一些更罕见的可能性也同样是最有趣的……尽管有时也最不幸。宁芙顽固的意志有时会促使她成为某个敌对王国中新的宁芙女王候选者，与第一位女王的边界相互挤压。另一些时候，这场斗争会在悲剧中发展，并且违背双方宁芙的本意：那名拒绝强势女王土地宣称的宁芙，其守护地反而被动荡所破坏。这通常发生在女王的宣称强大而令人信服，并且土地与生命力（vitae），或自然灵，都坚定支持女王，强大到足以排斥那名孤立宁芙的守护地之时。这可能使那名宁芙成为宁芙流浪者，或导致更为灾难性的结果。在最不寻常的情形中，两种不常见的状况会同时发生：世界承认那名未被说服的宁芙为宁芙女王候选者，而新候选者的守护地却同时失稳，使她成为宁芙流浪者。

无论你是否经历了这种悲剧性的力量争斗，或是以其他方式同时成为宁芙流浪者与女王候选者，作为宁芙流浪者与女王，你在所有宁芙之中都拥有独特的角色。作为同时也是流浪者的宁芙女王候选者，你能够成长而不必将自己锁定在一处静止的领地；并且由于缺乏守护地，如果你确实要建立领地，你在选择区域时会更具弹性。力量与潜能正在你体内增长，鼓励你开创属于自己的新领地，但你也可能选择将其用于自身目的。若你如此选择，自然世界本身可能会对此作出回应：要么以更多力量与能力引诱你走向女王的“正当”职责，要么不再以胡萝卜而改用大棒，不断鞭挞你，直到你承担起原本应当填补的角色。

你已开始获得女王候选者的力量，但这也意味着，你的升格真正的故事才刚刚开始。戴冠之首，难得安宁！

选择领地

获得一片领地是游戏故事中的重大承诺，这很可能会将你绑定在你所选择的位置上，因为你需要保护它，并守卫你的封臣以及领地内的自然生物免受伤害。“宣称领地”专长之所以稀有自有其理由，因此请事先与你的GM讨论，以确认领地是否适合当前战役。在许多情况下，拥有一片领地作为大本营、扩张机会、动机工具与故事催化剂，可能会让你的GM感兴趣；但在另一些情况下，若队伍需要四处长途旅行，领地就可能并不契合。通过在选择“宣称领地”专长之前提前与你的GM沟通，你可以给他们更多时间与你协作，创造一片完美契合你需求、GM需求以及团内其他玩家需求的领地。领地起初很小，但随着你作为宁芙女王的力量与影响力增长，它可能会随时间扩张。没有为领地体型扩张提供专长，因为这应当是通过游戏内动作赢得的奖赏或后果，而非通过角色构筑获得。询问你的GM，你是否可以使用《Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide》中的领导（子系统）或类似子系统来追踪你领地的进展。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.ppWlfz4TrRquPxfZ]{奈亚德女王之美}

Many of the world's most beautiful and pristine natural places share something in common: they are territories ruled by a powerful fey known as a nymph queen. For an ordinary nymph, becoming a queen is something of a dream. This royal status represents an extension of their bond with their ward, as a wider and wider territory becomes part of their ward until it's come to include an entire region. Over millennia of growth and careful protection of their territory, particularly powerful nymph queens rule over enormous forests or mountain ranges stretching across vast tracts of land.

These classic nymph queens have to carefully negotiate with other fey within their growing territory in order to earn their fealty as retainers, or else keep them in line with sheer charm, power, or intimidation. Even if other fey in the region could migrate elsewhere depending on their opinion of the new nymph queen, as a nymph queen's court and territory grow, they usually come to include the wards of more and more other nymphs. If those nymphs don't truly accept the queen as their sovereign in their hearts, it's usually impossible for the queen to absorb the nymph's ward into their territory. This can lead to a variety of different scenarios. The most common pair of possibilities is that either the queen's territory stops growing in that direction or it grows around the ward of the resistant nymph, leaving a tiny area surrounded by the queen's domain. However, some of the rarer possibilities are also the most interesting... though sometimes the most unfortunate as well. The nymph holdout's stubborn will sometimes leads them into becoming a new competing nymph queen candidate of a rival kingdom, pushing against the boundary of the first queen. Other times, the struggle tragically, and against the intent of either nymph, destabilizes the ward of the nymph who rejected the overwhelming queen's claim to the land. This tends to happen when the queen's claim is powerful and compelling and the land and the vitae, or nature spirits, firmly support the queen, enough to reject the lone nymph's ward. This can leave that nymph as a nymph wanderer or cause an even more catastrophic result. In the most unusual situation, both of the uncommon scenarios can happen at once: the world can recognize the unconvinced nymph as a nymph queen candidate, while the new candidate's ward is simultaneously destabilized, making her a nymph wanderer.

Whether you experienced this sort of tragic power struggle, or became both a nymph wanderer and a queen candidate in another way, as a nymph wanderer and a queen, you have a unique role among all nymphs. As a nymph queen candidate who is also a wanderer, you are able to grow without necessarily locking yourself into a static domain, and due to lacking a ward, you have a lot of flexibility in your region of choice if you do establish a domain. The power and potential are growing within you, encouraging you to forge a new domain of your own, but you might choose to use it instead for your own purposes. In that case, the natural world itself might respond to your choice by either tempting you toward the "proper" role of the queen with more power and abilities or by taking up the stick instead of the carrot and lashing out until you take on the role you were meant to fill.

You've begun to gain the powers of a queen candidate, but that just means the true story of your ascension is just beginning. Uneasy lies the head that wears the crown!

Choosing a Territory

Gaining a territory is a large commitment in the game's story, one that is likely to tie you down to the location you chose, as you need to protect it and defend your vassals and the natural creatures within the territory from harm. The Claim Territory feat is rare for a reason, so discuss with your GM in advance to make sure that a territory is right for the current campaign. In many cases, having a territory to use as a base camp, expansion opportunity, motivational tool, and catalyst for stories might be something that intrigues your GM, but in others, where the party travels far and wide, the territory just might not fit. By talking to your GM in advance, before taking the Claim Territory feat, you can give them more time to work with you and create the perfect territory that fits your needs, your GM's needs, and the needs of the other players in the group. While a territory starts off small, over time it might expand, as you grow in power and influence as a nymph queen. There's no feat included for a territory size expansion because this should be a reward or consequence earned through in-game actions rather than through character building. Ask your GM if you can use the Leadership subsystem from the Pathfinder Gamemastery Guide or a similar subsystem in order to track the progress of your territory.

Yai Adept Archetype.name: 雅依行者变体 Yai Adept Archetype
Yai Adept Archetype.text:
大多数恶鬼都会沿着一条可预测的变强之路前进：这条路建立在他们与那股恶毒力量所立下的契约之上——在神祇将他们作为神灵惩罚之后，那股力量给予了他们第二次机会。但作为一名恶鬼特立独行者，你有大量选择，可以自行决定你的力量之路。你也许会寻找一种与你旧日职责完全不同的感召，或是不同于你在恶鬼蜕变中所获赐的力量。然而，许多崖恶鬼特立独行者都与赋予他们力量的元素有着深刻联结，并希望以自己的方式去了解它。成为一名崖能者后，你学会了如何将恶鬼天性中在你体内奔涌的元素力量，引导为第三眼能量光束与强大的魔法效果——其中一些甚至连“普通”恶鬼都从未见识过。这些元素能力让你能够以富有成效的方式与世界互动，展现那曾从你身上被夺走的力量，并在世界上刻下你所选择的印记。

但当你继续探索新力量所带来的令人战栗的自由，以及你与周遭凡世互动的能力时，对任何崖能者而言，一股诱惑的暗流仍然存在。你可能会受到诱惑，不再把精力放在发展你所拥有的纯粹元素能力上，而是退回到你在残酷折磨中产生、使你无法与周围世界互动的负面情绪里。即使你并未受到诱惑，由于情感创伤，你也可能别无选择，只能一遍遍重温痛苦，直到你能战胜它。悲痛、苦难、无助、憎恨、嫉妒、需求，以及另外千百种负面情绪，可能成为你执着的焦点，并随之带来虚空的召唤。若你凝视你苦难的虚空，虚空也将回望你。正如永恒虚空巨龙在过度汲取那些力量时会冒着屈服于虚空腐化的风险一样，你也同样有可能发展出与虚空亲和的力量，变得越来越像虚空崖——恶鬼最强大的形态。

对于那些已经与邪恶势力达成（并忠实履行）契约的“普通”恶鬼来说，获得虚空崖之力是一件值得庆祝的事。但对特立独行者而言，这是一把双刃剑。每当你更接近成为虚空崖的状态一步，你也同时冒着重新落入旧日恩主魔掌的风险——那个在你成为恶鬼特立独行者时，被你骗走其应得代价的邪恶力量。关于出于自身私利而缔结契约的邪恶势力，有一点至关重要：他们痛恨被欺骗、被当作傻子。虽然他们之前或许对你的处境抱有些许同情（至少在那样的邪恶存在所能拥有的范围内），但当他们出于善意伸出援手，而你拿走他们提供的一切却逃避偿还时，你就成了他们的敌人。而如果他们再次抓到你，你很可能会后悔——深深地后悔。

幸运的是，是要通过学习并使用强大的虚空崖能力来诱使命运，还是要以与你的元素相符的能力稳妥行事，全都掌握在你手中。你会彻底屈服于虚空，还是完全避开它？又或者你会尝试在刀刃边缘保持平衡，自信自己能在为时已晚之前从悬崖边退回来？

虚空的诱惑

大多数恶鬼都会为能转化为虚空崖的机会而欣然跃起，而据说能催化这种转化的仪式与技巧早已遗失于时代之中，这让那些畏惧恶鬼之人得以松一口气。毕竟，如果每一个较弱的崖都能转化为恶鬼最强形态，那么任何凡人军队都不足以阻挡他们。具有讽刺意味的是，对于那些抛弃了邪恶恩主的恶鬼特立独行者而言，拥抱虚空之力，并在心智、肉体与灵魂层面都成为虚空崖，反而更容易。原因在于，从形而上学意义上说，恶鬼特立独行者是“未完成”的——当他们反悔交易时，恶鬼的创造过程就停止了。尽管多数人——无论是恶鬼特立独行者自身还是外界学者——更关注这意味着恶鬼特立独行者在生命起点上远不如典型恶鬼强大，但事情的另一面是：他们的灵魂并未像其他恶鬼那样被完全填满并封闭。这为他们留下了成长的空间，也留下了吸纳虚空并堕入其海妖之歌的余地。当一名恶鬼特立独行者选择越来越多的虚空专长时，他们的身体会明显变形，越来越像虚空崖；他们的心智、生命力与精神也会越来越受腐化。你的角色并不存在某个机制性的角色扮演节点会变成NPC；由你来决定如何角色扮演你坠入虚空的螺旋，或你与其诱惑抗争的挣扎。

20级

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.luXhEvgx4iNDw4ee]{Void Trap}

Most oni follow a predictable path to power based on their pact with the malign force that offered them a second chance after the gods punished them as a kami. But as an oni maverick, you have plenty of options from which to choose your own path to power. You might search for a calling totally different to your old duties, or to the power granted to you in your oni transformation. But many yai oni mavericks feel a deep connection to the element that has come to empower them, and seek to learn more about it on their own terms. By becoming a yai adept, you've learned how to channel the elemental power surging through you from your oni nature into third eye energy beams and powerful magical effects, some of which even "normal" oni have never come across. These elemental abilities allow you to engage with the world productively, showing off the power that was stolen from you and making the mark you choose upon the world.

But as you continue to explore the thrilling freedom of your new power and your ability to engage with the mortal world around you, an undercurrent of temptation remains for any yai adept. Instead of focusing your efforts on developing the pure elemental abilities you possess, you might become tempted to fall back into the negative emotions from your cruel torment unable to interact with the world around you. Even if you aren't tempted, thanks to the emotional trauma, you might have no other choice but to relive the pain until you can overcome it. Anguish, suffering, helplessness, hatred, envy, need, and a thousand more negative emotions might become your fixation, and bring with them the call of the void. If you stare into the void of your suffering, the void stares back. Just as aeternal void dragons risk succumbing to their void corruption by drawing too much upon those powers, so too do you risk developing powers with a void affinity, becoming more and more like a void yai, the mightiest from of oni.

For "normal" oni who have already made (and faithfully kept) a pact with evil forces, gaining void yai powers is an occasion to celebrate. But as a maverick, it's a double-edged sword. With each step toward becoming akin to a void yai, you also risk falling into the clutches of your old benefactor, the evil power you cheated out of their due when you became an oni maverick. And the most important thing to understand about evil forces who make pacts out of their own selfinterest: they hate being cheated and made the fool. While they might have had some sympathy for your situation before (at least as much as such an evil being can possess), when they extended a hand in good faith and you took what they had to offer while avoiding the repayment, you became their enemy. And if they get their hands on you again, you're very likely going to regret it. Deeply.

Fortunately, the ability to tempt fate by learning and using powerful void yai abilities, or to play it safe with abilities matching your elements, is all in your hands. Will you give into the void completely or avoid it entirely? Or will you try to balance on the edge of a blade, assuming you'll be able to pull back from the brink before it's too late?

Temptation of the Void

Most oni would leap at the opportunity to transform into a void yai, and the rituals and techniques said to catalyze such a transformation have been lost to time, causing those who fear oni to breathe a sigh of relief. After all, if every weaker yai was able to transform into the strongest form of oni, no mortal army would be strong enough to stop them. Ironically, for oni mavericks who cast aside their evil benefactor, embracing the power of the void and becoming a void yai in mind, body, and soul is actually easier. The reason is that oni mavericks are, in a metaphysical sense, "unfinished," meaning that the process of oni creation stopped when they reneged on the deal. While most people, oni mavericks and outside scholars alike, focus more on how this means oni mavericks begin their lives much less powerful than a typical oni, the other side of it is that their souls weren't completed filled up and sealed off like other oni. That leaves them space to grow and room to absorb the void and fall to its siren's call. As an oni maverick takes more and more void feats, their body visibly transforms to look more and more like a void yai, and their mind, life force, and spirit become more and more corrupted as well. There's no mechanical roleplaying point at which your character becomes an NPC; roleplaying your spiral into the void, or your struggle against its temptations, is up to you.

Faerie Scion.name: 妖精裔 Faerie Scion
Faerie Scion.text:
妖精裔是被希德触及的生物：无论他们是凡人与希德的孩子、被“带走”的人，还是被命运之线编入其魔法叙事之中的人。被希德异界那神秘莫测的妖精逻辑所缠绕，妖精裔扮演着特殊的角色：他们拥有弥合凡人族群与彼方妖精国度之间鸿沟的力量。如果你想扮演一个在深入希德与其他妖精世界的同时仍保留些许凡人感性的角色，你就该选择妖精裔。

你可能会……

  • 模糊凡俗世界与妖精国度的妖精逻辑之间的界线。
  • 在凡俗世界与妖精宫廷中都显得有些格格不入。
  • 拥有更强的魔法能力、领导技能，或扭曲叙事的力量。

其他人可能会……

  • 认为你拥有古怪而神秘的力量。
  • 依靠你去理解希德与其他妖精那异质的本性。
  • 有时把你误认为半精灵或其他类型的妖精。

外貌描述

妖精裔看起来大体与其族裔的其他成员相似，但他们会有一个或多个特征显露出其希德一面的本性。这些可能是又长又尖的耳朵、色彩斑斓的头发或眼睛，或其他各种因血脉而异的特征。几乎所有妖精裔至少都有长耳朵与高挑纤细的体态。

血裔——与芭欧梵希德的叙事与命运相连者——通常皮肤苍白，头发与眼睛呈深红色；他们有时也会共享芭欧梵希德那优雅的外表与捕食者般摄人心魄的魅力。

猫裔——与凯特希德的叙事与命运相连者——往往有些许猫科的眼睛与黑发，或拥有与某种猫品种毛色相符的头发颜色。

犬裔——与库希德的叙事与命运相连者——常有让人联想到某种特定犬种的发色与发型，可能是凡俗的也可能是魔法的；其中最常见的是像典型库希德那样蓬乱的深绿色毛发。

初裔——与艾斯希德的叙事与命运相连者——最可能拥有浅淡的粉彩色头发、皮肤与眼睛，这对其族裔的其他成员而言并不寻常。他们的五官可能如艾斯希德般精致，而其中少数人会散发出仿佛古老的、如同艾斯希德般无穷无尽的灵光。

缪斯裔——与莉安南希德的叙事与命运相连者——常带有一种审美的美感，却不具其他某些妖精裔血系所见的异界完美。有些人拥有莉安南希德那令人着迷的亲和力，使他们能以令人舒适的感觉引诱他人靠近。

贵胄裔——与达尼希德的叙事与命运相连者——最可能拥有深邃、浓郁且不寻常的头发、皮肤与眼睛颜色。他们的五官可能强势有力，如达尼希德一般，而其中少数人会散发出某种看似不可能的气质

社会

“妖精裔”这个名字给人一种妖精之子的印象，这是因为有关家庭与血脉的故事总能激发凡人的想象。尽管真正的希德凡裔后代——被称为“继嗣”——比“受邀者”妖精裔更为罕见，他们却已成为妖精裔的标志性形象。在由命运叙事所支配的希德世界里，“标志性”本身就拥有力量，因此继嗣的角色确有其特殊之处。他们往往会成为深层阴谋之网、惊人反转与不同寻常结局之传说的一部分。继嗣出现于希德与凡人结合之时，往往发生在希德短暂前往凡俗世界期间，或凡人稍纵即逝地造访希德的家园国度之时。若希德一方的父母是居于凡俗世界的希德英雄，或凡人一方的父母是受邀者妖精裔，他们可能会有更稳定的家庭。即便如此，命运总有办法让事情复杂化。

由于希德既偏爱恶作剧与阴谋，又有寄养他人的文化，继嗣的希德父母与他们所预期的希德不同并不罕见。在这种情况下，妖精裔的父母很可能会在最具戏剧性的时刻不可避免地揭示其身份，甚至可能发生在与那位后来被揭示为其父母的希德爆发重大冲突之后。不幸的是，命运最爱编织的故事之一，就是父母与子女在为时已晚之前都未能相认的战斗（甚至可能至死方休）。在极少数情况下，继嗣甚至可能是两位希德的孩子：他们被秘密寄养在凡俗国度里，通过魔法被“变成”妖精裔，并与两位凡人的孩子互换（而后者通常会在妖精异界中作为受邀者被抚养长大）。在这种情况下，命运总会在最具戏剧性的时刻揭示他们作为完整希德的本性。一个完美的例子是：妖精裔可能看似已经死亡，然而他们会在使用诸如 Not Today 或 Plot Armor 之类的希德能力幸存时，抛却其凡人形态；以失去其与凡俗相系的一部分本性为代价，彻底成为希德。也同样并不罕见的是，在命运的搅动下，于凡俗世界长大的“人造继嗣”会在不知真相的情况下，与被互换的受邀者相遇并成为盟友、恋人或凡人敌人，直到命定的揭晓到来才恍然大悟。

受邀者是通过与希德接触而被带入妖精世界的凡人，通常是希德有意为之，因此得名“受邀者”。希德推广了用“受邀者”来称呼这些妖精裔，而一些凡人则认为这只是一个委婉说法，因为这一过程并不总像“邀请”那般无害；这些凡人更倾向称其为“绑架”或“带走”。受邀者是最常见的妖精裔——当然，以凡人总体人口而言他们仍相当稀少。许多警世故事都以受邀者作为故事的英雄或受害者。那些食用妖精的食物与美酒、参与妖精之舞，或以其他方式沉浸在某个希德异界故事中的人，可能会转化为妖精裔；但当他们发现自己终于回到家时，已然过去一个世纪，而他们曾经熟悉的一切都已消失。与此同时，一些希德会寄养一个凡人孩子，以换取把自己的孩子交由凡人的寄养家庭抚养，从而学习更多凡俗国度之事。这类文化交换可能是凡人自愿的，也可能不过是换个名字的绑架。与许多其他多用传承不同，受邀者妖精裔往往在生命后期才经历“邀请”。也许命运认为：那些与他人纠缠最深、甚至已有自己家庭的人，在这些联系被命运之剪剪断时，会经历最巨大的逆转。若某个角色在游戏中成为受邀者，他们可能可以将其传承重训为妖精裔的传承；以舍弃自身的一部分凡俗性为代价，换取希德的妖精精髓。

在所有妖精裔中最为罕见的是命定者：他们成为妖精裔并非因为亲缘或希德的介入，而完全源于命运的一次行动。这可能是因为交错的故事线——凡人被卷入了一位或多位希德叙事的经纬交织之中；此时，凡人自身的搅局或厄运在命运的干预下层层递进，最终变成更深且无法逃避的联系。另一方面，有时从凡人的视角看这一切完全毫无征兆；成为命定者妖精裔就是他们首次接触希德世界。有时，命运会在命定者成为妖精裔之后，才在更晚的时间揭示其与妖精国度的另一层联系；而另一些时候，他们此前确实毫无关联。在这些情况下，命运判定他们以妖精裔身份的参与能为叙事增添真正有趣的内容，于是出手提升戏剧张力。与受邀者相似，这也可能发生在生命后期，并可能导致角色在失去一部分凡俗性时，将其传承（以及可能连同一个血系专长）重训为妖精裔。

妖精裔聚居地

妖精裔生活在凡人或希德之中，有时在两个世界之间往来，担任大使。当某位妖精裔罕见地建立聚居地时，其叙事必然极其精彩纷呈，因为命运乐于新奇。正因如此，妖精裔聚居地稀少却意义重大。有时它们会成为一个全新凡人王国的核心。

阵营与宗教

作为妖精裔出生或成为妖精裔，并不保证该妖精裔自身的道德观会与希德宫廷那异质的伦理与逻辑相似。尽管如此，妖精裔往往会觉得希德逻辑出奇地引人入胜，或至少比其他凡人更易理解。个体妖精裔也会在阵营倾向上微弱地朝向与其血系相符的希德倾向；不过对受邀者、尤其是命定者而言，这更常见的原因是：该凡人本就与那种希德的世界观相契合，因此才成为妖精裔；而不是成为妖精裔改变了凡人的阵营，使其更接近希德。

尽管并非所有妖精裔都崇拜命运，但几乎所有人至少都会承认命运对其人生具有过分巨大的影响。命定者尤其如此。有时妖精裔会发现：崇拜与希德“命运”概念相容的凡人神祇更为容易，例如命运或幸运的神祇，或故事与叙事的神祇。在 Alacar，这包括“三段故事”神系，其中有英雄神祇 Jata、诡计者神祇 Sewa、或反派神祇 Sumaworo。

名字

妖精裔通常会拥有与其族裔其他凡人相似的名字，至少在一开始是如此。通常唯一的例外是那些继嗣或被寄养的受邀者：他们由希德父母抚养并命名。然而，著名的受邀者或命定者有时会为自己在命运计划与希德社会中的位置取一个头衔，并鼓励希德使用该头衔而非其凡人名字。这样做的原因多种多样。其一，一个常见母题认为：让希德知晓你的真名会使其获得对你的力量，类似于使用希德的真名。当故事足够共鸣时，对希德而言它可能开始变得真实。尽管这一担忧更为遥远，但事实是：希德更可能尊重一个被介绍为“故事收割者”的妖精裔，而非一个被介绍为“约翰”的妖精裔。在这种情况下，带头衔的名字会赋予妖精裔在希德之中的地位，使其与凡人区分开来，并抬升其被认为的重要性。

示例名字

Connla、Emrys、Oisin、The Fated Heir、The Green Knight、The Once and Future King、The Winnower of Tales。

妖精裔冒险者

妖精裔往往几乎别无选择，只能成为冒险者——如果他们之前还不是的话。他们选择的职业往往与其血系相符，不过吟游诗人和奇术师在所有妖精裔中都很常见。他们的背景也往往与其如何成为妖精裔有关，例如：猫裔或犬裔的动物低语者、缪斯裔的艺术家或音乐神童、贵胄裔的贵族或王族。

妖精裔（罕见传承）

无论你是希德的后裔、被希德邀请进入其宫廷与狂欢，还是被命运选中，你的一部分属于希德，并将永远渴望妖精国度。除你的族裔所具有的特征外，你获得妖精裔特征。你还获得昏暗视觉；若你已拥有昏暗视觉，则改为获得你选择的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-monsters-pf2e.yom-feats.Item.JNS0QeQzX8fDiYxw]{Midnight Sight} 希德族裔专长或 Sidhe Stride 妖精裔族裔专长。每当你获得族裔专长时，你可以从妖精裔专长与自己族裔的专长中选择。从希德族裔的传承列表中选择一个希德血系，以决定你的外貌。这不会让你能选择那些以特定希德传承为先决条件的专长，除非你先获得相应的血系专长。

族裔专长

以下族裔专长可供妖精裔选择。妖精裔只有少数仅对他们独有的族裔专长，但他们解锁了绝大多数希德族裔专长的潜力，这些列于下方的额外专长中。带有传承先决条件的额外专长要求妖精裔获得相应的血系专长。
